items.subject: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
items.body: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.

items.body: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.

summary:
Here are the key developments with insight:

**Top 4-6 developments:**

* **OpenAI model solves 80-year-old conjecture in discrete geometry**: An OpenAI model has disproved a major conjecture in discrete geometry, marking a significant milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
* **NVIDIA announces record revenue for Q1 FY 2027**: NVIDIA reported record revenue for the first quarter ended in May, indicating strong demand for its AI and GPU technologies.
* **OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments**: OpenAI and Dell have partnered to bring Codex, an AI-powered coding agent, to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments, enabling secure AI coding across data and workflows.
* **NVIDIA and Google Cloud empower the next wave of AI builders**: NVIDIA and Google Cloud are collaborating to accelerate AI development, providing tools and resources to support the next generation of AI experts.
* **Amazon SageMaker AI introduces OpenAI-compatible API support**: Amazon SageMaker AI has introduced OpenAI-compatible API support for real-time inference endpoints, enabling businesses to integrate OpenAI capabilities with AWS services.

**Trend:** **More companies are embracing AI and collaborating with OpenAI and NVIDIA to drive innovation**: OpenAI and NVIDIA are partnering with multiple companies, including Dell, AWS, and Google Cloud, to develop and integrate AI technologies, driving the growth of the AI industry and further democratizing access to AI innovation.

Note: These developments highlight the increasing focus on AI research, development, and adoption across various industries, with a particular emphasis on the importance of partnerships and collaborations in driving innovation and growth.
